description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent hip roof and a central chimney. The front features a covered porch supported by columns, a driveway leading to an attached garage, and a car parked outside. The property is landscaped with several large trees, bushes, and a fenced backyard that includes a round above-ground pool, a swing set, and a patio area. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The exterior walls appear to be finished in light-colored siding, with contrasting darker roofing material. The house sits on a rectangular plot with clear boundaries and a well-maintained yard.
description: A two-story suburban house with a hip roof, attached garage, covered porch, and landscaped yard featuring trees, a pool, and a swing set.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entryway, driveway, garage, and a car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a round pool, swing set, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, backyard features, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, chimney, and more trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and a modest overhang
